name: ETL Reconciliation Check
shortDescription: Detects ETL drift using row-count and checksum reconciliation.
longDescription: Compares source and target ETL summaries with deterministic checks to catch data-loss and transformation drift before release.
author: ARS Data

inputs.name: source_summary
inputs.description: Source dataset counts, duplicates, and checksums.

inputs.name: target_summary
inputs.description: Target dataset counts, duplicates, and checksums.

outputs.name: reconciliation_report
outputs.description: Deterministic report of count and checksum mismatches.

includedAssets.name: scripts/reconcile_summaries.py
includedAssets.description: Compares source and target summary JSON metrics.

failureModes: Summary files exclude key business dimensions.
Mismatch triage is delayed and blocks release timelines.

examples.title: Daily orders ETL reconciliation
examples.summary: Flags checksum mismatch despite matching row counts.
examples.outputPreview: FAIL with checksum discrepancy on order_total

changelog.summary: Initial release for deterministic ETL reconciliation.
